summary: Made a minimal exit-side continuity polish so Marcia's final money calculus more clearly hands off to Tiana's next-chapter northbound campus movement, while preserving the chapter's existing opening, beats, and voice.
edits: Added a single closing-line bridge that earmarks part of Marcia's July plan for what Tiana will need to carry north.
Retained the opening paragraph because its temporal caretaker entry is already distinct from the next chapter's campus-location opening.
Verified no style-bible example lines appear verbatim in the chapter.
